basics.name: Koray Devecioglu
basics.label: Senior software engineer
basics.summary: Placeholder summary — replace. Two or three sentences that explain what Koray builds, what he's good at, and what kind of problems he's looking for next. Voice stays the same as the blog: concrete, direct, no corporate fluff.

work.name: Northwind Systems
work.summary: Placeholder role. Platform team for a multi-tenant B2B SaaS, focused on reliability and developer experience.
highlights: Designed and shipped a typed event bus that replaced three ad-hoc pub/sub mechanisms, cutting onboarding time for new services from days to hours.
Led the migration from a monolithic Postgres to per-tenant schema isolation — zero downtime, 40% reduction in noisy-neighbour latency.
Mentored two engineers through promotion; authored the team's incident-writeup template now used org-wide.

work.name: Contoso Logistics
work.summary: Placeholder role. Owned the routing engine for a same-day delivery platform across three countries.
highlights: Rebuilt the ETA estimator around a streaming model; reduced MAPE from 18% to 7% on the top three metros.
Introduced property-based testing into the routing codebase; regressions-found-before-prod went from 40% to 85%.
Shipped the driver-facing iOS app's offline-first queue — held up through a regional ISP outage that used to take ops offline.

work.name: Fabrikam
work.summary: Placeholder first role. Backend squad for a consumer-facing e-commerce site.
highlights: Cut the checkout API's p95 latency from 1.1s to 280ms by precomputing cart totals and reworking the tax pipeline.
Wrote the team's first load-test harness; findings drove a rewrite of the inventory reservation path.

projects.name: koraydevecioglu.com
projects.description: This site. Astro 5, TypeScript strict, Tailwind v4, MDX, built content-first with a Zod-validated collection layer and a typed résumé pipeline.
highlights: Milestone-driven build with per-phase PRs and a reproducible local gate.
Zero-cookie analytics, self-hosted variable fonts, dynamic OG images at build time.
